title: Add EVE smoke greeting
summary: Added smoke/hello.txt containing the exact requested EVE greeting and verified its content, line count, byte count, and Git whitespace validity before committing.
userVisibleChange: Adds smoke/hello.txt with the message “hello from EVE”.

timeline.title: Plan approved
timeline.summary: EVE Plan plan_5ec6a2b642f80ba2 revision 1 was approved and locked before editing.

timeline.title: Greeting file added
timeline.summary: Created smoke/hello.txt with the single line hello from EVE.

timeline.title: Exact content verified
timeline.summary: Validated the text, one-line structure, 15-byte size including the trailing newline, and git diff whitespace checks.

decisions.title: Use a single newline-terminated text file
decisions.rationale: Matches the requested content exactly while preserving conventional text-file formatting.

validation.command: test "$(cat smoke/hello.txt)" = "hello from EVE" && test "$(wc -l < smoke/hello.txt | tr -d ' ')" = "1" && test "$(wc -c < smoke/hello.txt | tr -d ' ')" = "15" && git diff --check
validation.output: Passed: exact text matched; line count was 1; byte count was 15; git diff --check reported no errors.
